messages.content:
List the affected operating systems and their versions.

A race condition was addressed with improved state handling. This issue is fixed in macOS Big Sur 11.7.9, macOS Monterey 12.6.8, macOS Ventura 13.5. An app may be able to gain root privileges.
Affected operating systems and their versions include macOS Big Sur 11.7.9, macOS Monterey 12.6.8, and macOS Ventura 13.5.
